epoch.host: Coopers-MacBook-Pro.local on the Codex local agent host

runtime.name: TaxKit workspace
runtime.version: base a8a58882cd6c5f8003d31dc0c0567d78093597b9 plus the uncommitted HGI-206 candidate

workerFeedback.reason: Worker feedback latency was not directly measured; value remains null.

workerWallClock.reason: Worker wall-clock duration was not directly measured; value remains null.

humanAttention.reason: Synchronous human attention was not directly measured; value remains null.

acceptedOutcome.reason: Time to accepted outcome was not directly measured and acceptance is pending; value remains null.

failedAttempt.limitation: No prior member tree/path manifest is retained; the full known prior candidate digest is preserved verbatim.

impactLedger.owner: TaxKit harness-governance SPEC and active plan
impactLedger.evidence: Both current-intent owners now identify HGI-206 as in progress at the exact HGI-205 base with independent grading pending.
impactLedger.postcondition: SPEC and active plan agree on target, scope, lifecycle, limitations, and next acceptance owner.
impactLedger.nonClaim: In-progress intent is not task acceptance or Git publication.

impactLedger.evidence: HGI-206 adds a focused local command but does not change the accepted HGI-205 CI graph; the canonical verification and release-readiness gates exercise it unchanged.
impactLedger.postcondition: The accepted CI graph remains the canonical workflow owner.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Local execution does not establish hosted CI state.

impactLedger.evidence: The final candidate binds exact source, changed-path, failed-attempt, contradiction, five-receipt and five-detail identities; every derived record is excluded from the source aggregate with an explicit circularity reason.
impactLedger.postcondition: All local evidence is addressable, bounded, hash-bound, retained, and independently gradeable.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Candidate evidence is not independent acceptance or external-state proof.

impactLedger.owner: package.json and tools/evals HGI-206 scenario/typecheck contracts
impactLedger.evidence: The root exposes exact check:hgi-206 and test:hgi-206 commands; the scenario contract and focused no-emit TypeScript project are source-manifest members.
impactLedger.postcondition: A fresh worker can retrieve and invoke the focused verifier and type/test gates.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Command discovery grants no consequential authority.

impactLedger.owner: TaxKit documentation router, audit index, and harness verification owners
impactLedger.evidence: The audit index routes the candidate while the two new verification owners record bounded epoch, effectiveness, limitations, recovery, and triggers.
impactLedger.postcondition: Current documentation routes the candidate without promoting it to accepted truth.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Documentation does not prove publication, deployment, provider state, or public availability.

impactLedger.owner: oxlint.config.ts and typed HGI-206 forbidden-claim corpus
impactLedger.evidence: Only input.boundary.ts is admitted to decoding and only check.runtime.ts to entrypoint/runtime/process/console/Bun boundaries; fifteen semantic fixtures cover the rubric contradictions.
impactLedger.postcondition: The evaluator passes the unchanged rules with exact boundary files and no suppression.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Lint admission does not prove runtime or external outcomes.

impactLedger.evidence: The sole lifecycle router now points to the harness epoch, effectiveness, and candidate owners with pending-grade language.
impactLedger.postcondition: Maintainers can retrieve the current HGI-206 route without duplicated procedure.
impactLedger.nonClaim: The route does not accept HGI-206.

impactLedger.evidence: The candidate limits rollback to future accepted task-scoped commits in reverse order and requires preservation of terminal evidence; no commit exists in this worker scope.
impactLedger.postcondition: Rollback remains bounded to an accepted future Git identity.
impactLedger.nonClaim: No rollback or recovery operation is authorised or performed.

impactLedger.owner: docs/runbooks/README.md and exactly four target-owned runbooks
impactLedger.evidence: HGI-206 consumes the accepted HGI-204 procedures and authority stops without changing or duplicating a procedure.
impactLedger.postcondition: Exactly four canonical runbooks remain procedure owners.
impactLedger.nonClaim: No release, publication, deployment, provider, or recovery procedure executes.

impactLedger.evidence: The repo-local skill and profile already route material evidence and closeout work; their exact hashes are included in the source and epoch projections.
impactLedger.postcondition: Skill routing remains current without copying verifier procedure into the skill.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Skill availability grants no provider or release authority.

impactLedger.evidence: Strict Schemas, one JSON ingress boundary, flat semantic validation, fifteen typed predicates, focused test, and one Bun runtime entrypoint replace the rejected monolith.
impactLedger.postcondition: Focused Oxlint, Oxfmt, TypeScript, test and canonical verifier gates can exercise the exact evidence contract.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Local evaluator tests are not independent grading or external consumer proof.

independentGrade.nonClaim: This repaired worker-local candidate is not independent fresh-context acceptance.

limitations: One pass qualifies only the recorded target and epoch.
No hosted CI, Git publication, registry, deployment, provider, public-site, release, recovery, or future-epoch state is proved.
rollback: After parent acceptance only, reverse identified HGI-206 task-scoped commits in reverse order while retaining every terminal receipt; this worker creates no commit.
